scope.description: Watch and handle follow-up work for the entire 15_지선차단기 project folder.

expected_behavior.on_needs_codex: Wake or resume the target Codex thread and ask it to apply the latest Gemini action request.
expected_behavior.on_review_clean: Stop follow-up work for that PR.
expected_behavior.on_review_blocked: Do not run schematic edits; surface the blocker first.
